title: e-Elimu Portal
desc: Centralized education platform integrating scholarships, verification workflows, and graduation clearance operations.
impact: Improved nationwide service delivery and reduced processing time for students.

title: TCMS
desc: Teacher College Management System for admissions, finance, timetabling, and institutional reporting.

title: FDC-MIS
desc: Monitoring and evaluation system for planning, execution tracking, and KPI-based performance review.
impact: Enabled data-driven planning with executive-level reporting visibility.
